instance: All assignments must be written in clear English. ESL learners are encouraged to seek support from writing resources or tutoring services to meet this standard.

support.assumption: Providing academic writing standards and directing ESL learners to support resources is a legitimate, inclusive educational practice rather than discriminatory or harmful content.
